pi_items.source: Price discrepancy analysis showing non-uniform ratio variations across time

privileged_info_summary: The task involves configuring an Ichimoku weekly chart for SPY in NinjaTrader 8 with specific parameters (tenkan=9, kijun=26, senkou_b=52) and ADX period=14. The underlying SPY historical data spans 502 trading records from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024. Volumes in the data match Yahoo Finance exactly, confirming they are real trading volumes. However, OHLC prices do not match Yahoo Finance; prices deviate by 1.17-4.03% with non-uniform adjustment ratios across the dataset (2023 mean ratio 1.0338 ± 0.0045), indicating the price data is synthetic while volume data is authentic.
